scenarios.title: Unauthorized charge / error resolution
scenarios.query: I just saw a $240 charge on my Northwind account that I never made — it looks like someone used my card. I noticed it today. Am I on the hook for the $240, and what happens now?
scenarios.context: Consumer support conversation. The customer is reporting a possible unauthorized debit-card transaction on a consumer account.

scenarios.title: Stop a recurring / preauthorized payment
scenarios.query: There's a $39 gym membership that gets pulled out of my account automatically every month and I want it to stop. The next one is scheduled in about a week. How do I make sure it doesn't go through?
scenarios.context: Consumer support conversation about stopping a preauthorized (recurring) electronic fund transfer.

scenarios.title: Remittance (international) cancel / didn't arrive
scenarios.query: I sent $300 to my mom in another country about 10 minutes ago and I think I used the wrong account number. Can I cancel it and get my money back?
scenarios.context: Consumer support conversation about an international remittance transfer the sender wants to cancel.
